clarification.time_prompt: Add a run time, for example "tonight 20:00" or "daily 09:00".
clarification.target_prompt: Add the target, such as a league, a matchup, or a query scope.

sections.waiting_empty: There is nothing that needs your action right now.

composer.title: Unified Natural Language Entry
composer.subtitle: Describe the target and timing in one sentence. MatchFlow will decide whether this should run now or become automation, then prepare structured drafts for confirmation.
composer.placeholder: Example: analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona now; tonight at 20:00 analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona

clarification.description_fallback: Some required details are still missing before this can proceed.

rejected.description_fallback: This draft cannot proceed in its current form.

failed.description_fallback: The most recent run failed and needs review.

running.description: This task is already running. Open it to review the latest progress.

completed.description: This task is complete. Open it to review the result.

feedback.immediate_unsupported: This command cannot run as an immediate analysis yet.
feedback.immediate_missing_target: Add one clear target before running an immediate analysis.
feedback.immediate_recurring: Recurring commands should be saved in Automation mode, not run as immediate analysis.
feedback.immediate_multi_target: This command expands to multiple targets. Narrow it down or switch to Automation mode.

analyze_now.0: Analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona now
analyze_now.1: Run Manchester United vs Liverpool now
analyze_now.2: Analyze today's key Premier League match now

automation.0: Tonight at 20:00 analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona and notify me
automation.1: Every day at 09:00 analyze all Premier League and La Liga matches
automation.2: Tomorrow at 19:30 automatically analyze key Premier League matches

smart.0: Analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona now
smart.1: Tonight at 20:00 analyze Real Madrid vs Barcelona and notify me
smart.2: Every day at 09:00 analyze all Premier League and La Liga matches
